declarations.description:
Purpose: A dialog is a type of modal window that appears in front of app content to provide critical information or ask for a decision.
Category: Actions, Content Display
When to use: When you need to display important information or ask for user input.
When not to use: When you need to display non-critical information or when a simple alert would suffice.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-input, mc-select
Alternative component names: Modal, Popup, Lightbox
declarations.name: McDialog

cssParts.description: for changing the whole dialog element
cssParts.name: `dialog`

slots.description: The body HTML to use for the dialog.
slots.name: `default`

slots.description: The primaryAction HTML to use for the dialog. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.
slots.name: `primaryAction`

slots.description: The secondaryAction HTML to use for the dialog. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.
slots.name: `secondaryAction`

events.name: closed
events.description: The closed event gets dispatched once the dialog is closed.
The closing event gets dispatched once the dialog is closing.
events.name: closing
opened
events.description: The opened event gets dispatched once the dialog is opened.
The opening event gets dispatched once the dialog is opening.
events.name: opening

events.description: The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the primaryAction/secondaryAction button within a dialog.
events.name: click
